apps.name: Cyanide
apps.subtitle: Tweak runner on the DarkSword kernel r/w exploit
apps.localizedDescription:
Cyanide is an iOS tweak runner built on top of the DarkSword kernel r/w primitive (CVE-2025-43510 / CVE-2025-43520).

Supported targets:
• iOS/iPadOS 17.0 — 18.7.1
• iOS/iPadOS 26.0 — 26.0.1
• A19/M5 devices are not supported
• iOS 18.7.2+ and 26.1+ are out of the exploit window

Bundled tweaks:
• StatBar — battery temperature + free RAM overlay
• SBCustomizer — custom dock count and home-screen grid
• Powercuff — CPU/GPU underclocking via thermalmonitord
• SpringBoard Tweaks — App Library, icon fly-in, wake animation, backlight fade, double-tap to lock
• OTA Disabler — toggle launchd disabled.plist
• Respring — in-app WKWebView respring trigger
• Axon Lite (beta) — group Notification Center requests by app
• Signal Readouts (beta) — RSRP dBm on cellular, bar count on WiFi

Not a traditional jailbreak — tweaks apply in real time over RemoteCall. No respring needed, and force-quitting Cyanide stops live tweaks like StatBar and Axon Lite.
